creator: ibex@physik.TU-Berlin.DE
text:
Hello!

I have done a port for ethereal-0.3.11 which honors the newest
bsd.port.mk-changes.

It is available at

	http://www.physik.TU-Berlin.DE/~ibex/ports/ethereal-0.3.11.tar.gz

Please have a look at it...

	Best regards Dirk
